scope: Turn environment selection and sandbox metric/policy tag derivation.
_sourceRootBrandingAllow: branding-scan: allow local source root path in parity artifact

documentedOmissions.reason: Exec request construction, sandbox request transformation, and subprocess execution are already owned by runtime/src/sandbox/engine/manager.ts and runtime/src/unified-exec/process-manager.ts. C-01f adds the missing environment-selection and tag helpers without relocating those owners.

requiredBehaviors: default thread selections return a single selection when the environment manager exposes a default id
default thread selections are empty when the manager has no default environment
resolved selections preserve selection order and expose primary environment, primary filesystem, and protocol selections
edgeCases: duplicate environment ids are rejected before resolving environment handles
unknown environment ids raise an invalid-request style error
custom shell metadata is preserved on resolved turn environments

requiredBehaviors: disabled and unrestricted non-managed profiles emit the none metric tag
external sandbox profiles emit the external metric tag
managed profiles requiring platform isolation emit the active platform sandbox metric tag
Windows elevated sandbox mode emits a distinct windows_elevated metric tag
edgeCases: unrestricted managed profiles stay untagged until managed network enforcement is requested
restricted-token Windows sandbox mode emits the regular windows_sandbox tag
read-only compatibility policy tags are derived from profile conversion rather than string literals

requiredBehaviors: restricted profiles without writable roots report read-only
restricted profiles with writable roots report workspace-write
edgeCases: restricted filesystem-root write grants report danger-full-access
project-root write grants are resolved against cwd before determining workspace-write
network mode does not change the filesystem policy tag
